creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
Since mid-November the port science/helfem now breaks on CURRENT (and only on CURRENT) with this error:


> /usr/local/bin/ld: CMakeFiles/helfem.dir/src/erfc_expn.cpp.o: in function `helfem::atomic::erfc_expn::Phi_general(unsigned int, double, double)':
> erfc_expn.cpp:(.text+0x3b): undefined reference to `std::__1::enable_if<is_move_constructible<double>::value&&is_move_assignable<double>::value, void>::type std::__1::swap<double>(double&, double&)'
> /usr/local/bin/ld: CMakeFiles/helfem.dir/src/erfc_expn.cpp.o: in function `helfem::atomic::erfc_expn::Phi_short(unsigned int, double, double)':
> erfc_expn.cpp:(.text+0x969): undefined reference to `std::__1::enable_if<is_move_constructible<double>::value&&is_move_assignable<double>::value, void>::type std::__1::swap<double>(double&, double&)'
> /usr/local/bin/ld: CMakeFiles/helfem.dir/src/erfc_expn.cpp.o: in function `helfem::atomic::erfc_expn::Phi(unsigned int, double, double)':
> erfc_expn.cpp:(.text+0xac4): undefined reference to `std::__1::enable_if<is_move_constructible<double>::value&&is_move_assignable<double>::value, void>::type std::__1::swap<double>(double&, double&)'
> /usr/local/bin/ld: libhelfem.so: hidden symbol `_ZNSt3__14swapIdEENS_9enable_ifIXaasr21is_move_constructibleIT_EE5valuesr18is_move_assignableIS2_EE5valueEvE4typeERS2_S5_' isn't defined
> /usr/local/bin/ld: final link failed: bad value


Log: http://beefy18.nyi.freebsd.org/data/main-amd64-default/padc6a8b51697_s479ea5cf2d/logs/helfem-g20210912_1.log
